description_long: This object consists of two plush, star-shaped stuffed toys with alternating red and white stripes radiating from the center of each star. The fabric appears soft and slightly wrinkled, with the edges of the stars gently curving upward, giving a puffy and inviting appearance. On one side, one of the stars features two large, round, cartoon-like eyes and a small crescent-shaped mouth, adding a playful and friendly character. The other star is plain, with only the striped pattern visible. The toys are stacked together, with the facial features partially visible from certain angles. The overall look is whimsical and suitable for children, with a design reminiscent of a stylized sea star or cartoon character.
description: A pair of plush, star-shaped stuffed toys with red and white stripes, one featuring cartoon eyes and a mouth, creating a playful and whimsical appearance.
description_view_0: Two star-shaped stuffed toys are visible, with the striped pattern and puffy texture prominent; the facial features are not visible from this angle.
description_view_1: The striped pattern and soft, plush form of both stars are clear, with the toys overlapping and no facial features visible.
description_view_2: The front star displays large cartoon eyes and a small mouth, giving it a friendly expression, while the second star is mostly hidden behind.
description_view_3: The facial features of the front star, including the eyes and mouth, are clearly visible, with the second star partially obscured behind it.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with large, wide-open eyes and a small, curved mouth suggesting a happy demeanor.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The stuffed toys are lying flat with their star-shaped limbs splayed outward, one partially stacked on top of the other.
